channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. and Iran wrap up 'most intense' nuclear talks with no deal — more negotiations ahead
item.description: Iran's nuclear program, enrichment of uranium and its ballistic-missle development program have been at the crux of the negotiations.

item.title: This investment-firm founder made a 180-degree turn on AI after testing Claude
Cash App and Square maker Block’s stock is surging on AI job-cut bombshell
Trump allies David and Larry Ellison win the battle for Warner Bros. Discovery
Columbia U. student Elmina Aghayeva released from ICE custody after Trump, NY mayor meeting
item.description: Elmina Aghayev was taken into custody by ICE agents from a student residential building owned by Columbia University.

item.title: Netflix CEO Sarandos visited White House right before streamer said WBD deal is off
item.description: President Donald Trump last weekend demanded that Netflix fire former Obama administration official Susan Rice from its board or else “pay the consequ...

item.title: Bond rally takes 10-year yield below 4% for 1st time since autumn — follow live
Duolingo's stock sinks as app makes changes to contend with the threat of AI
Trump administration faces first big tariff refund court deadline on Friday
item.description: Trump's DOJ has until Friday to decide on moving a tariff refund case to the Court of International Trade, the first deadline since the Supreme Court ...

item.title: Democrats plan to force Iran war powers vote next week
item.description: The president has commanded a massive military buildup in the region, as he negotiates a new nuclear deal with Iran.
